title: stephanopappus reflexus
side_effects: Stephanopappus reflexus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure may lead to liver damage and kidney failure. The plant's toxic compounds can also cause confusion, dizziness, and tremors, especially in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions. In severe cases, improper use of Stephanopappus reflexus can result in coma or even death.
